show-inputs-ingame.name: Show Inputs In-Game
show-inputs-ingame.description: Show input bars when playing a level with a matching JSON replay.

bar-height.name: Bar Height
bar-height.description: Height of the input bars in pixels.

bar-y-position.name: Bar Y Position
bar-y-position.description: Vertical position of the bars from the bottom of the screen.

indicator-color.name: Indicator Color
indicator-color.description: Color for the player position indicator outline.

indicator-style-line.name: Indicator Style: Line
indicator-style-line.description: If enabled, the indicator is rendered as a vertical line. If disabled, it is rendered as a square.

background-color.name: Background Color
background-color.description: Color for the background strip behind the input bars.

accent-color.name: Accent Color
accent-color.description: Accent color for the mod UI.

ur-bar-width.name: UR Bar Width
ur-bar-width.description: Width of the UR bar in pixels.

ur-bar-height.name: UR Bar Height
ur-bar-height.description: Height of the UR bar in pixels.

ur-good-frames.name: Good Zone (frames)
ur-good-frames.description: Number of frames for the Good zone (±). At 240fps, 1 frame ≈ 4.17ms.

ur-earlylate-frames.name: Early/Late Zone (frames)
ur-earlylate-frames.description: Number of frames for the Early/Late zone boundary (±).

ur-very-frames.name: Very Early/Late Zone (frames)
ur-very-frames.description: Number of frames for the Very Early/Late zone boundary (±). Beyond this is a Miss.
